abilities.description: Your wyvern won’t devour you. For now. When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.3ff03b51f620ab26]{Undertake an Expedition} or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ed490d43a2533506]{Set a Course} and score a hit, you may @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.0fcfea7696d1de15]{Sacrifice Resources} (-1) to feed their appetite in exchange for +2 momentum.

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} by commanding your wyvern to attack, roll +heart. On a weak hit, mark progress. On a strong hit, mark progress twice as the feral fury of your wyvern tears through the opposition.

When you make the @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.d34cdf2408cd22b6]{Companion Takes a Hit} move for your wyvern, their armored hide and primal resilience come to the fore; add +2 and take +1 momentum on a hit.
